title: Easy Recipes
description: Adds several quality-of-life crafting recipes allowing for more resource-efficient crafting directly from your inventory.
body:
**What is this for?**
---
This mod/datapack aims to make building easier, more resource efficient, and more fun. No more running back to your crafting table for more stairs or slabs, just make as many as you want directly from your inventory, and any extra resources can be crafted right back into the original blocks!

![3 blocks placed in an L shape to craft 4 stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2836a3e58b53a3d7552852f928f5da4512cb4fd3.png)
![4 stairs placed in a square to craft 3 blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f93f091f372d3dd91b41145f5e7b0729afcb5705.png)
![2 blocks placed next to each other horizontally to craft 4 slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ca92f49f7abeac29be0f3b3f2c4918d5b25d84a.png)
![2 slabs placed next to each other vertically to craft 1 block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52116acb3387d04916090e13d2c7a7fdfb7b47c3.png)

**Extra features**
---
The new glass recipes make sure that you won't need to collect more sand than you actually need!

![1 glass block to craft 4 glass panes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/394693d13e4714aa65e5fd8beb1b78e3f91e26da.png)
![4 glass panes to craft 1 glass block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/935d0f92a6b2923fa9ec0ba2acc434a0193fa472.png)

The new trap door recipe now uses just 2 slabs, and the original recipe gives you 6x more!

![2 slabs placed next to each other horizontally to craft 4 trapdoors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8555038ce633a26b4540fdc70526842f3fd7bb47.png)

**Want more?**
---
If you like this mod then you might also enjoy [Simple Tools](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simple-tools), which adds new recipes that allow you to craft wood and stone tools directly from your inventory.

[![Icon for the Simple Tools mod, showing a cobblestone block above a stick on the left, with a red arrow in the center pointing towards a stone shovel on the right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4fb88e240a9f9e927b32ef2ae3277069a32c48a.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simple-tools)
